data.title: Ex-Mayor Eric Adams accused of hijacking NYC token concept; startup claims shaky start for his project.
data.description: The digital asset associated with the ex-New York City Mayor Eric Adams has faced a rough beginning, as new accusations have been brought against the initiative.
Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by Fifth Third Bancorp

data.title: Rithm Capital priced Public Offering of 10 million shares at $25 per share, for approx. $250M in gross proceeds.
data.description: Rithm Capital Corp. disclosed the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 10,000,000 shares of its 8.750% Series F Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. This Preferred Stock has a liquidation preference set at $25.00 per share, amounting to an approximate gross total of $250,000,000. After accounting for underwriting discount and various offering expenses, the Company expects net proceeds. Additionally, the Company plans to seek listing of the Preferred Stock.

data.title: Probe Gold shareholders approve plan of arrangement with Fresnillo. Each share to be acquired for $3.65 cash.
data.description: In Toronto on January 13, 2026, Probe Gold Inc. (TSX: PRB) (OTCQB: PROBF) announced that shareholders approved a plan of arrangement at a special meeting. The resolution involved the acquisition of all outstanding shares by Fresnillo plc, Prestadora de Servicios Jarillas, S.A. de C.V., and Fresnillo Quebec Acquisition Inc. Shareholders voted in favor of the cash offer of $3.65 per share.

data.title: XRP, Solana, mid-cap cryptocurrencies show strength amid market underperformance. Bitcoin and Ethereum stall, while traditional assets see rally.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies faced a lackluster performance in a positive week for risk assets, with Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) trading in narrow ranges while certain alternative coins showed better strength. Wintermute's January 2026 market report highlighted this divergence, noting a general uptrend in traditional markets. The Russell 2000 index saw a 4.6% increase, and equities, gold, and U.S. Treasurys all saw gains, benefiting from a weaker dollar. Bitcoin experienced a 0.6% decline, and Ethereum fell by 0.7% during the week. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ITW to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 3, 2026, 7:00am CST, with earnings webcast at 9:00am CST.
data.description: In Glenview, Illinois, on January 13, 2026, Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) is set to announce its Q4 and full year results for 2025 on February 3, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CST. A webcast regarding the earnings for Q4 and full year 2025 will follow at 9:00 a.m. CST on the same day.

data.title: Highland Copper selling 34% interest in White Pine to Kinterra for $30 million in definitive agreement.
data.description: Highland Copper Company Inc. from Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed on Jan. 13, 2026, that it successfully signed a definitive Membership Interest Purchase Agreement with Kinterra Copper USA LLC. The agreement involves the sale of Highland Copper's 34% stake in the White Pine North Project for a total consideration of roughly US$30 million. This transaction follows a previous press release from November 25, 2025, regarding the same matter. Highland Copper, listed on TSXV as HI and on OTCQB as HDRSF, expressed satisfaction with this development.

data.title: Old Glory Bank, accepting crypto, aims for Nasdaq via SPAC. Bank founded in 2022, seeks approval for public listing.
data.description: In 2022, a newly established bank with a focus on digital services is preparing to debut on the Nasdaq through an initial public offering. The bank's move to go public is contingent upon receiving approvals from shareholders and regulatory bodies.

data.title: Travere's shares plummeted after delay of Filspari drug for kidney disease; investors react, Ligand also impacted.
data.description: Shares of Travere Therapeutics plummeted on Tuesday following news of a setback for their drug, Filspari, in the treatment of kidney disease. The delay in the drug's development caused a significant drop in the company's stock prices. The pharmaceutical company, along with Ligand, experienced a sharp decline in their shares as investors reacted to the unexpected setback for their key drug. This news was reported in Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the impact of the delay on the companies involved.

data.title: Align Technology sponsors 30 Invisalign treatments for children and teens through Smiles4Canada program in partnership with CFAO.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona, Align Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALGN) revealed a partnership with the Canadian Foundation for the Advancement of Orthodontics (CFAO). As part of this collaboration, Align will be providing Invisalign treatment for 30 qualified patients. Align Technology is recognized for its Invisalign system, iTero intraoral scanners, and exocad CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry. This initiative showcases the company's dedication to advancing orthodontic care in partnership with CFAO.

data.title: Dow Jones, S&P 500 drop as financials and software slump, Google leads AI stocks in buy zones.
data.description: The stock market saw a decline from recent highs as the Dow Jones, S&P 500 fell, mainly due to decreases in financial and software sectors. However, there was optimism surrounding Google and other companies involved in artificial intelligence (AI) as they were found to be in favorable buy zones. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: DOD invests $1 billion in L3Harris, plans missile IPO. LHX stock hits record highs. Trump Admin involved.
data.description: The Trump Administration has announced a substantial investment of $1 billion in L3Harris, along with the acquisition of an ownership stake in the spinout of their missile business. This news has caused a surge in LHX stock prices, reaching record highs. L3Harris is set to receive the substantial investment from the Department of Defense and is planning an initial public offering for its missile business.

data.title: Dow and S&P 500 drop from record highs, Caterpillar rises as Moderna soars. Inflation data impact felt.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow and S&P 500 experienced declines from their previous record highs. However, Caterpillar showed progress towards a significant milestone. The stock market today observed the Dow plummet as investors processed inflation data, while Moderna experienced a surge.

data.title: TG Therapeutics stock (NASDAQ: TGTX) surged in after-hours trading following positive Q4 revenue estimates and optimistic 2026 outlook.
data.description: Shares of TG Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TGTX) saw an increase during after-hours trading on Tuesday following the release of preliminary fourth quarter revenue estimates and a positive forecast for 2026. The company anticipates a strong performance in the coming year. For more information and in-depth analysis, please visit Benzinga.com.
